response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and versatile software engineer with a strong track record of technical craftsmanship and initiative, including founding an open-source project. His 18 years of experience and recent work on AI-agent infrastructure are positives. However, his profile aligns more with a hands-on Staff or Principal engineering role rather than the director-level strategic focus required here. His AI experience appears nascent, and he lacks demonstrated experience in setting high-level AI strategy, advising external partners, or having recognized expertise in the AI field, which are central to this position.
strengths: Extensive and broad software engineering experience (~18 years) across various domains.
Demonstrated initiative and leadership through founding an open-source project and organizing technical workshops.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and tooling.
concerns: Lacks experience in a director-level strategic role; career progression has been to Staff/Senior Engineer.
AI-specific experience is very recent and appears more implementation-focused than strategic.
No evidence of advising senior leadership or external strategic customers on technology adoption.
